topic_label: 日常生活理財痛點探索
research_goal: Understand where real day-to-day personal finance pain actually appears in current life, how strong it is, what workaround exists today, and what deeper why sits behind it, without assuming any solution or any fixed finance stage.
product_context: Open exploration only. Do not assume a product exists. Do not assume the pain sits in one specific part of personal finance. Let the participant's real story determine whether the pain is about account opening, payments, spending, saving, debt, family coordination, protection, investing, or something else.
